title: verify.conditions request

clock.description: Action-specific clock input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

name.description: Saved-object name in this action namespace; do not assume names are shared by cursors, lists, and protocol configs.

mode.description: Action processing or return mode. Its legal values, default, and interactions are action-specific.

items.description: Structured conditions configuration. Only the declared properties are accepted.

conditions.description: Ordered conditions entries. Each item must satisfy the declared item contract.

edge.description: Clock sampling edge. The schema default is authoritative; negedge often matches monitor semantics.

sample_point.description: Before/after observation point for posedge or dual sampling; it does not change the raw waveform range.

items.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

oneOf.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

additionalProperties.description: Value for a caller-defined signal alias key. Supply the real signal path or the action-supported expression for that alias.
additionalProperties.x-dynamic-contract: Each property key is an alias referenced by this action; each value resolves that alias to a signal path or supported expression.

oneOf.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

signals.description: Signal-path list or alias-to-path/expression map. Expressions must reference aliases rather than nested paths.

time.description: Target sample time. Prefer a canonical string with a unit; a bare number is interpreted only with time_unit.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

value_format.description: Action-specific value_format input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

description: Verify multiple conditions at one sampled time.
x-purpose: 在单个时间验证条件集合。
x-how_it_works: 解析 clock/time，按 args.signals 采样 alias，并对 conditions[].expr 求值。
x-when_to_use: 检查某个时间点的多条件事实。
x-description-zh: 在单个时间验证条件集合。

use_when: 需要在一个采样时刻验证命名条件集合。
do_not_use_when: 需要跨时间窗口的持续性结论或原始表达式求值。

alternatives.when: 需要一个表达式在一个时刻的值。
